# infomaniak_public_cloud_accesses (Data Source)

Reports the maintenance status of the Public Cloud API surface for the given account. Despite the endpoint name, it does not list region accesses.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "infomaniak_public_cloud_accesses" "this" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (Number) Infomaniak account identifier. Discover it with `curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $INFOMANIAK_TOKEN" https://api.infomaniak.com/2/profile | jq '.data.preferences.account.current_account_id'`.

### Read-Only

- `is_maintenance_ongoing` (Boolean) True when a Public Cloud maintenance window is currently active for this account.
